The premier conference on crypto's collective future

December 5-6, 2024 • Prague

Emergence, crypto's newest conference, will debut this winter in Prague. Emergence is more than an event; it's a catalyst for innovation, a hub of new possibilities, and a showcase of the latest trends shaping the crypto landscape. Join us and be part of the collective action that's defining the future world of blockchain and digital currencies.

The Venue

Welcome to the heart of Europe

Prague is the capital and largest city of the Czech Republic and the historical capital of Bohemia. On the Vltava river, Prague is home to about 1.3 million people. Emergence will take place at the prestigious Prague Congress Centre, set against the stunning panorama of the city.

Join us in December for an event that not only promises insightful sessions, but also an unforgettable experience in one of Europe's most captivating cities. Immerse yourself in the unique blend of tradition and modernity that Prague has to offer, while making impactful connections at Emergence.

Sponsors

Amplify your brand

Unlock Authentic Connections: Bridging the physical and digital in the blockchain and crypto communities, Emergence 2024 offers brands a niche opportunity to directly engage with the blockchain, web3, and greater crypto communities. Connect with our dedicated sponsorship team today to explore how your organization can benefit from participating in this year's Emergence crypto conference.
